candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Losses on Other Plant
candidates.why: The only explicit D&A-like row shown appears within the Selling and Administrative Expenses section, not alongside or under Cost of revenues/COGS. It therefore does not appear to be COGS-related D&A to add separately.

variables.notes: No separate operating D&A row attributable to the selected COGS bucket is visible in the excerpt above the financial section.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Losses on Other Plant
candidates.why: This row appears as a component within the Selling and Administrative Expenses section, with the selected parent row 'Selling and Administrative Expenses' acting as the total bucket. Adding it separately would likely double count because it appears embedded in the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS row.

variables.notes: The explicit D&A-like row is presented as a sub-component of the selected SG&A total, so it should not be added separately.
